## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your preferred solution or implementation approach. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- List any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or references here. -->

## Impact

- [ ] This feature would require breaking changes
- [ ] This feature would require documentation updates
- [ ] This feature would require new tests
- [ ] This feature affects existing tools or middleware
